title: OCTŌ Restore Bergamot + Rosemary + Spearmint + Lemon | Scented Candle. Made with Essential Oils and Soy Wax. 250ml
features: 100% pure and natural essential oils, no synthetic fragrance, no dye
100% Natural Soy Wax [Biodegradable, Eco-Friendly, Non-GMO, Pesticide Free, Phthalate Free, Not Tested on Animals]
BURN TIME: 35-40h Burns longer and cleaner than paraffin wax

SCENT: Come home after a long day and curl up with your favourite book while letting the rejuvenating scent of our Restore scent fill the room. This scent was created to help you calm and recharge your mind. Bergamot has a clean refreshing citrus scent together blended with herbaceous rosemary and refreshing spearmint.
description: Product Description Essential oil candles hand poured into apothecary inspired amber jars in London. Scents inspired by nature, countryside and the seasons. With a passion for candles and the cosy memories they evoke, Octō candles were born with the aim of creating natural, affordable and original candles. Hand poured in South East London in small batches. These scented creations are made of the finest ingredients, including clean-burning plant wax and keenly combined essential oils. With life getting busier all the time, slow down and make time for yourself. Combining the sweet scents of rose geranium, the earthy shades of patchouli and woodsy Vetiver. May Chang has a refreshing, stimulating scent, it is bursting with lemony fragrance with fruity and spicy undertones. Rosemary essential oil is warm and energizing with an herbaceous aroma and a citrus-like undertone This neroli, lime, and basil candle combines bright citrus with peppery undertones to provide a new and exciting addition of freshness to any occasion. Bergamot orange (Citrus aurantium var. bergamia) is a small, pear-shaped citrus fruit, which grows on small trees.
